itinerary.title: Athirapally & Vazhachal Waterfalls
itinerary.description: Visit the majestic and roaring Athirapally Waterfalls (the Niagaras of Kerala) and the nearby Vazhachal Waterfalls. Transfer to your hotel in Kochi. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

itinerary.title: Kochi Heritage & 3-Hour Backwater Cruise
itinerary.description: Explore Fort Kochi, Mattancherry, and view the Container Terminal. Enjoy a peaceful 3-hour boating excursion in the backwaters. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

itinerary.title: Thenmala Dam, Palaruvi Falls & Laser Show
itinerary.description: Travel to Thenmala. Visit the Thenmala Dam, Deer Park, Palaruvi and Kuttikalam waterfalls. Watch the evening Laser Show before transfer for departure. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

title: Athirapally, Kochi & Thenmala Tour
description: Embark on a natural and heritage tour across Kerala. Witness the spectacular Athirapally and Vazhachal waterfalls, explore the history and backwaters of Fort Kochi and Mattancherry, and experience eco-tourism, wildlife, and laser shows in Thenmala.
highlights: Witness the breathtaking Athirapally and Vazhachal waterfalls
Tour the historic sites of Mattancherry and Fort Kochi
Enjoy a relaxing 3-hour backwater boating tour
Explore Thenmala Dam, Deer Park, and Palaruvi and Kuttikalam Waterfalls
Watch the spectacular Laser Show at Thenmala
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change
